name: desk-data-fetch-and-analysis
description: Run daily data fetch first, then generate daily analysis report and optimization actions.

steps.name: fetch-data
steps.prompt: Execute daily data fetch for yesterday (UTC). Use the configured fetch script and return output paths + row count.

steps.name: analyze-data
steps.prompt: Using latest normalized data produced by fetch step, generate daily report and actions JSON. Context from fetch step:\n\n{{fetch_output}}
